title: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
sourceNotes: Single-cour TV anime by CloverWorks (13 episodes, Jul 6 - Sep 28 2025) adapting Saka Mikami's ongoing manga (Kaoru Hana wa Rin to Saku), serialized in Magazine Pocket. AniList lists chapters as null; per fan episode-to-chapter guides the anime covers manga ch 1-39 (ep 13 also touches ch 40), so a viewer resumes reading at ch 40. As of June 2026 the manga is at ~ch 193 across 23 tankobon volumes (vol 23 = ch 173-179; ch 180+ uncollected), used here as the unadapted-tail endpoint. This is a slow-burn romance with loose arcs, so the groupings below are approximate and built by clustering the episode-to-chapter mapping into story phases.

mappings.arc: Meeting Across the Divide (Rintaro & Kaoruko at the Waguri bakery; Chidori vs Kikyo)
Merging Worlds (Subaru's feelings; friend groups intertwine; Rintaro's circle finds out)
Awakening Feelings (Rintaro grapples with his growing feelings amid school events & outings)
Confession at the Festival (the two become a couple)
Dating Life & Beyond (unadapted, ongoing; ch 40 is where to resume reading)
